summary: Tested three UI features: 1) Compact VariantModal (verified in code), 2) Haul post variant pills (found 8 pills showing color variants like 'Maroon', 'Pop-Blue', 'Los Angeles Pressing'), 3) Format pills on feed posts (found 40 'Vinyl' pills), 4) Collection page format submenu (All/Vinyl/CD/Cassette filter pills with counts). All features are working correctly. Note: 503 errors are expected from Discogs API rate limiting.

issues: React hydration warning: nested <a> tags inside RecordCard. The variant link (<a href='/variant/...'>) is nested inside the record link (<a href='/record/...'>) causing console warnings. This is a code quality issue but does not affect functionality.

variant_modal_compact.max_width_300px: Line 53: sm:max-w-[300px] class applied to DialogContent
variant_modal_compact.album_art_w14_h14: Line 60: w-14 h-14 class applied to album art container
variant_modal_compact.ultra_compact_badges: Lines 98-119: text-[9px], px-1.5 py-px metadata badges

collection_format_submenu.filter_click_functionality: PASS - CD filter shows bg-vinyl-black active state

action_items: MINOR: Fix nested <a> tag issue in CollectionPage RecordCard - variant link should not be nested inside record link
critical_code_review_comments: VariantModal.js: Properly implements compact design with max-w-[300px], w-14 h-14 album art, text-[9px] badges
PostCards.js: FormatPill component (lines 1100-1113) correctly shows Vinyl/CD/Cassette with icons
HivePostCard.js: FormatPill imported and displayed next to PostTypeBadge (line 284)
PostCards.js: NewHaulCard component (lines 414-494) correctly renders haul-variant-pill-{idx} on bundle items with color_variant
CollectionPage.js: Format filter submenu (lines 1014-1048) with All/Vinyl/CD/Cassette pills and counts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three UI features verified working: 1) VariantModal is compact (300px max width, 14x14 album art, tiny badges), 2) Haul posts show color_variant pills overlaid on album covers (found variants like 'Maroon', 'Pop-Blue'), 3) Feed posts show FormatPill with 'Vinyl' text, 4) Collection page has format filter submenu (All/Vinyl/CD/Cassette) with counts. There's a React hydration warning about nested <a> tags in CollectionPage but this doesn't affect functionality. The 503 errors in console are from Discogs API rate limiting (expected behavior).

variant_modal_compact.description: Scaled down modal with max-w-[300px], w-14 h-14 album art, text-[9px] metadata badges

haul_variant_pills.description: color_variant pills rendered on album covers in haul bundle cards

format_pill_on_feed.description: FormatPill showing Vinyl/CD/Cassette next to PostTypeBadge

collection_format_submenu.description: Format filter pills with All/Vinyl/CD/Cassette options and counts
